requirement_topic.en: EEC Grid Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz and Utility Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: EEC并网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及电力公司协调
requirement_topic.zht: EEC併網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及電力公司協調

summary.en: Eswatini uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage supply. Grid-connected EV charger installations should be coordinated with Eswatini Electricity Company (EEC), the national utility, and with Eswatini Energy Regulatory Authority (ESERA) where licensing, tariff, network, or energy-sector approval questions arise. Because Eswatini imports power from South Africa and participates in the SADC / SACU regional economy, charger projects should expect Southern African utility practice, IEC-family technical evidence, load assessment, protection coordination, metering, and site commissioning documentation.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼采用230/400 V、50 Hz低压供电。并网电动汽车充电桩安装应与国家电力公司Eswatini Electricity Company（EEC）协调；涉及许可、电价、网络或能源监管审批问题时，还应与Eswatini Energy Regulatory Authority（ESERA）确认。由于埃斯瓦蒂尼从南非进口电力，并参与SADC / SACU区域经济，充电项目应预期适用南部非洲电力公司实践、IEC体系技术证据、负荷评估、保护配合、计量和现场调试文件。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼採用230/400 V、50 Hz低壓供電。併網電動汽車充電樁安裝應與國家電力公司Eswatini Electricity Company（EEC）協調；涉及許可、電價、網絡或能源監管審批問題時，還應與Eswatini Energy Regulatory Authority（ESERA）確認。由於埃斯瓦蒂尼從南非進口電力，並參與SADC / SACU區域經濟，充電項目應預期適用南部非洲電力公司實務、IEC體系技術證據、負荷評估、保護配合、計量和現場調試文件。

standards_or_laws: Eswatini Electricity Company grid-connection and supply coordination requirements
Eswatini Energy Regulatory Authority electricity-sector oversight
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality context

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is commonly 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Eswatini's 230/400 V, 50 Hz system requires confirmation of voltage range, protection settings, power quality, derating, and site connection documentation against EEC and ESERA expectations rather than relying on China domestic grid acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流通信GB/T 27930，以及当地电网运营商验收文件。中国国内供电通常为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V、50 Hz系统要求按照EEC和ESERA预期确认电压范围、保护整定、电能质量、降额和现场接入文件，而不能依赖中国国内并网验收。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流通訊GB/T 27930，以及當地電網運營商驗收文件。中國國內供電通常為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。埃斯瓦蒂尼230/400 V、50 Hz系統要求按照EEC和ESERA預期確認電壓範圍、保護整定、電能質量、降額和現場接入文件，而不能依賴中國國內併網驗收。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters should confirm that charger input ratings cover 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, prepare single-line diagrams and load calculations for the EEC supply point, document harmonic and EMC performance, confirm protective-device coordination, and obtain project-specific EEC / ESERA guidance before shipment or site activation. China 220/380 V domestic acceptance evidence is not a substitute for Eswatini utility coordination.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认充电桩输入额定值覆盖230 V单相和400 V三相、50 Hz，针对EEC供电点准备单线图和负荷计算，记录谐波及EMC性能，确认保护器件配合，并在出货或站点激活前取得项目特定的EEC / ESERA指导。中国220/380 V国内验收证据不能替代埃斯瓦蒂尼电力公司协调。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認充電樁輸入額定值覆蓋230 V單相和400 V三相、50 Hz，針對EEC供電點準備單線圖和負荷計算，記錄諧波及EMC性能，確認保護器件配合，並在出貨或站點激活前取得項目特定的EEC / ESERA指導。中國220/380 V國內驗收證據不能替代埃斯瓦蒂尼電力公司協調。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory project gate — grid-connected installations require EEC supply coordination and may require ESERA regulatory confirmation depending on site, operator, tariff, and network impact
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an EEC or ESERA approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EEC grid coordination as a project gate. A China domestic charger package must be checked for 230/400 V, 50 Hz ratings, protection coordination, power-quality evidence, and EEC / ESERA site requirements before installation in Eswatini.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将EEC并网协调视为项目门槛。中国国内充电桩资料包在埃斯瓦蒂尼安装前，须核查230/400 V、50 Hz额定值、保护配合、电能质量证据，以及EEC / ESERA现场要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將EEC併網協調視為項目門檻。中國國內充電樁資料包在埃斯瓦蒂尼安裝前，須核查230/400 V、50 Hz額定值、保護配合、電能質量證據，以及EEC / ESERA現場要求。
